mxCell.value:
Milestones (individual rewards):
M1: Move >5 blocks from spawn (+10)
M2: Dig 3 blocks (+30)
M3: Pick up 3 items (+30)
M4: Dig 5 wood blocks (+50)
M5: Kill 1 animal (+50)
M6: Kill 2 animals (+80)
M7: Dig 3 stone blocks (+60)

[!] 2–3 agents must dig simultaneously.
Solo digging is impossible.

All 3 agents must regroup here to unlock Ch4 door.

M16: Enter isolation cell (+20)
M17: Switch pressed (+40)
M18: Cell door opened (+60)
M19: All in communal (+100, team)

Milestones:
M20: Enter Ch4 (+30)
M21: First mob kill (+60)
M22: All mobs killed (+150, team)
M23: All agents alive (+100, team)
Door to Ch5 opens when all 3 zombies dead

Milestones:
M24: Enter Ch5 (+50)
M25: First boss hit (+80, team)
M26: Boss at half HP (+120, team)
M27: Boss defeated (+300, team)
M28: All agents alive bonus (+250, team)
